dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: WARNING: THIS EPISODE CONTAINS STRONG LANGUAGE THAT MAY NOT BE SUITABLE FOR SOME READERS.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: YOU TOOK A PHOTO OF THAT PART?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: YEP, WANNA SEE?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: NOPE~ I CAN'T SEE!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I WANNA SEE! IF ONLY DANIEL WASN'T HERE!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: DON'T BE SO COY!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OH MY!

dialogue.speaker: MIRA
dialogue.line: WHAT ARE YOU TALKING ABOUT? BOYS! DO NOT SHOW IT!!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: I WAS JUST LISTENING LIKE ALWAYS.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: ZACK'S PUNCH IS LIGHTNING FAST, REALLY. I COULDN'T SEE HIS FIST!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HAHAHA

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: HEY, STOP, I'M NOT PROUD OF IT.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: TALK A LITTLE LOUDER! LOUDER!

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: ARE THEY HEARING THIS? NEWBIE? MIRA?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: MY STRENGTH! ZACK IS SCARY. I CAN'T COMPETE.

dialogue.speaker: MIRA
dialogue.line: I REALLY HATE THAT.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHY DON'T YOU JUST GO OUT WITH HIM? HE'S NICE TO YOU~

dialogue.speaker: MIRA
dialogue.line: HE'S ALWAYS FIGHTING.

dialogue.speaker: MIRA
dialogue.line: A WHILE AGO, HE INVITED ME TO A MOVIE, BUT HE GOT IN A FIGHT IN THE STREET AGAIN!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I'M NOT REALLY SHOCKED.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT DO YOU MEAN?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: YOU DON'T KNOW?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HE WAS A RISING BOXER IN MIDDLE SCHOOL.

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: I'M NOT PROUD OF USING A STRAIGHT PUNCH TO LEAVE HIM GROGGY. I SHOULD'VE THROWN A JAB.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: ENOUGH; AS A BOXER,

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WOW~ WHAT A PRO~

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OH, YEAH; HE WAS FAST.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: WHY DO I HAVE TO SIT NEXT TO HIM OF ALL PEOPLE?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HEY, DANIEL, GOT A GIRLFRIEND?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: DANNY~ WHAT'S UP? LET'S CHILL~

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: SHE'S ALWAYS PROWLING WITH ME.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: BEES!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: NO ONE, HUH? CAN STOP HER, LOL. SHE WORKS HARD, KEKE.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HAHA, COME TO THINK OF IT, THAT PIGGY'S MOM MUST BE A PIGGY TOO. PIGS ARE BORN FROM PIGS. HAHAHA. WHAT IF THE PIGGY BRINGS HIS MOM? LOL. BEES, THEY ARE GROSS. THEN I'M GONNA STRIP BOTH NAKED. HAHA. LOL. YOU LUNATIC!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WAS SHE HAPPY AFTER GIVING BIRTH TO HIM?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HAHA, CRAZY.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I WOULD HAVE GIVEN HIM UP.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: BECAUSE OF ME, MY MOM WAS BEING INSULTED. WHEN SHE DOES HER BEST... IF YOU WANT TO INSULT SOMEONE, JUST INSULT ME! BEFORE I KNEW IT, 'HEY YOU GUYS, YOU'VE GONE TOO FAR!' THE WORDS CAME OUT OF MY MOUTH.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: AGAIN; IN FRONT OF MIRA.

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: HEY, YOU'RE F***ING FUNNY, YOU KNOW THAT?

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: GET UP, YOU F***ING WORM!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: FIGHT! FIGHT IN THE FASHION DEPARTMENT! LET'S GO SEE! THEY SAY IT'S THE NEWBIE! WITH ZACK LEE? HOLY! WHERE IS IT? IS HE THAT HANDSOME? LET'S GO WATCH! PRETTY BOY? WHERE'S THE NEW GUY?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: YAH, DAMN! CAN'T SEE! THERE'S ZACK LEE! LIGHTNING HANDS! AND THE NEW GUY? WHERE IS HE?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: HE TOLD ME TO GET UP, SO I DID.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: CRAZY! AWESOME! HE'S GORGEOUS!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: I'M GONNA GET HIT AGAIN.

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: HEY WUSS, I TOLD YOU TO COME AT ME! LET'S SEE IF HE KNOWS HOW TO FIGHT.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHY'S HE STANDING THERE? F***, I WAS SCARED FOR NO REASON BEFORE. IS HE SCARED?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OH MAN, I GUESS THAT GUY IS NOT A FIGHTER. ZACK LEE! STOP! THIS'LL BE SAD TO SEE. HIS POSTURE IS POOR. HE'S JUST A PRETTY BOY?

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: NICE! ONE PUNCH KNOCKOUT! LET'S DO THIS! WATCH CLOSE, MIRA.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT THE F*** IS HE? WHAT IS JAY DOING?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WOW, FIRST TIME I'VE SEEN HIM.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: STEP UP, HE'S USUALLY LIKE A FLY ON THE WALL, BUT HIS GRIP IS INCREDIBLY STRONG!

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: MIRA!

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: LET GO, YOU DUMBASS!

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: NOW YOU'RE DEAD MEAT!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: EVER SINCE I WAS LITTLE, I GOT HIT A LOT. SO AT SOME POINT, I COULD SEE THE FIST COMING SLOWLY, BUT I WAS TOO SLOW. MY BODY WOULDN'T MOVE AS I INTENDED.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: BUT HE DODGED ZACK'S FIST! HE'S CRAZY FAST! AMAZING!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WOOOOAH! HOW'D HE DO THAT? DID YOU SEE? F***ING INCREDIBLE! WHO IS THIS GUY? WOW!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: TODAY WAS THE FIRST TIME MY BODY FOLLOWED MY WILL.

summary: This episode begins with a warning about strong language. Students tease each other, and Mira expresses frustration with Zack's constant fighting, revealing a cancelled movie date due to his street brawl. Daniel, an observer, is subjected to cruel bullying about his appearance and his mother. Pushed to his breaking point, Daniel confronts the bullies, leading to a fight with Zack Lee in the fashion department. The crowd is initially dismissive of Daniel but becomes astonished as he skillfully dodges Zack's attacks, a feat Daniel realizes is the first time his body has truly obeyed his will.
